ns0:entry.ns0:title: CoplayDev/unity-mcp
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/CoplayDev/unity-mcp
Language: c%23
Unity MCP acts as a bridge, allowing AI assistants (like Claude, Cursor) to interact directly with your Unity Editor via a local MCP (Model Context Protocol) Client. Give your LLM tools to manage assets, control scenes, edit scripts, and automate tasks within Unity.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Facepunch/sandbox
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Facepunch/sandbox
Language: c%23
Sandbox mode for s&box

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/JasperFx/wolverine
Language: c%23
Supercharged .NET server side development!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: bitwarden/server
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/bitwarden/server
Language: c%23
Bitwarden infrastructure/backend (API, database, Docker, etc).

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dnnsoftware/Dnn.Platform
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dnnsoftware/Dnn.Platform
Language: c%23
DNN (formerly DotNetNuke) is the leading open source web content management platform (CMS) in the Microsoft ecosystem.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/aspnetcore
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/aspnetcore
Language: c%23
ASP.NET Core is a cross-platform .NET framework for building modern cloud-based web applications on Windows, Mac, or Linux.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/eShop
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/eShop
Language: c%23
A reference .NET application implementing an eCommerce site

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/maui
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/maui
Language: c%23
.NET MAUI is the .NET Multi-platform App UI, a framework for building native device applications spanning mobile, tablet, and desktop.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/roslyn
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/roslyn
Language: c%23
The Roslyn .NET compiler provides C# and Visual Basic languages with rich code analysis APIs.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/skills
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/skills
Language: c%23
Repository for skills to assist AI coding agents with .NET and C#

URL: https://github.com/microsoft/aspire
Language: c%23

ns0:entry.ns0:title: openclaw/openclaw-windows-node
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw-windows-node
Language: c%23
Windows companion suite for OpenClaw - System Tray app, Shared library, Node, and PowerToys Command Palette extension

ns0:entry.ns0:title: radzenhq/radzen-blazor
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/radzenhq/radzen-blazor
Language: c%23
Radzen Blazor is the most sophisticated free UI component library for Blazor, featuring 110+ native components including DataGrid, Scheduler, Charts, and advanced theming with full support for Material Design and Fluent UI. If Radzen Blazor is useful to you, a ⭐ on GitHub helps other Blazor developers find it.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: shadowsocks/shadowsocks-windows
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/shadowsocks/shadowsocks-windows
Language: c%23
A C# port of shadowsocks

ns0:entry.ns0:title: unoplatform/uno
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/unoplatform/uno
Language: c%23
Open-source platform for building cross-platform native Mobile, Web, Desktop and Embedded apps quickly. Create rich, C#/XAML, single-codebase apps from any IDE. Hot Reload included! 90m+ NuGet Downloads!!
